company.name: UMANG
company.tagline: Building Bihar's water infrastructure for the next generation

hero.title: Engineering the infrastructure Bihar relies on
hero.text: For nearly two decades, Umang Infrastructure has designed and built the water towers, reservoirs and supply networks that bring safe water to communities across Bihar.

hero.title: Built to last. Delivered on schedule.
hero.text: From reinforced-concrete reservoirs to district supply networks, we hold every project to exacting standards — and to its deadline.

hero.title: Clean water is the foundation of growth
hero.text: We treat, supply and recycle water responsibly, protecting both the communities we serve and the environment we share.

about.heading: Two decades of building water that lasts
about.body: Established in 2006, Umang Infrastructure is a leading water-infrastructure firm headquartered in Purnia, Bihar. With over a decade of specialised experience, we deliver the full lifecycle of water engineering — treatment, supply, recycling and waste-water handling — across both rural and urban Bihar.
points: 50+ water infrastructure projects delivered across Bihar
World-class reinforced-concrete reservoirs and overhead towers
Complete water treatment, supply and recycling systems
Trusted quality in rural and urban construction alike

services.title: Delivered On Time
services.text: We are bound by our commitment to deliver every project to specification and schedule.

services.title: Engineering Quality
services.text: Reinforced, durable, and built to exacting standards that stand the test of time.

services.title: Safe Drinking Water
services.text: Making clean, safe drinking water available and affordable to the communities we serve.

services.title: Environmental Care
services.text: We protect the environment in everything we build, from sourcing to recycling.

services.title: Skilled People
services.text: Our experienced engineers and teams are the strength behind every project.

services.title: Trusted & Accountable
services.text: Two decades of reliable delivery have made us a name communities trust.

milestones.text: Umang Infrastructure is established to serve Bihar's growing water-infrastructure needs.

milestones.title: 25th project delivered
milestones.text: Reached 25 completed water towers and reservoirs across the region.

milestones.title: Expanded to supply networks
milestones.text: Added district and rural water-distribution networks to our capabilities.

milestones.text: Crossed 50 delivered projects serving over a million people with safe water.

posts.text: A new reinforced-concrete reservoir handed over, expanding safe water access in the district.

posts.text: We marked our 50th completed water-infrastructure project across Bihar.

impact.heading: Water is a right, not a privilege.
impact.body: Beyond our projects, we work to bring safe, clean water to the communities that need it most — supporting wells, hand-pumps and hygiene awareness across rural Bihar. (Sample text — replace with your real initiatives.)

items.title: Clean Water Access
items.text: Helping under-served villages reach a reliable, safe source of drinking water.

items.title: Community Wells & Hand-pumps
items.text: Installing and maintaining shared water points that serve families for years.

items.title: Awareness & Hygiene
items.text: Running sanitation and water-hygiene awareness drives in local schools and panchayats.

careers.intro: We are always looking for engineers, site supervisors and project staff who take pride in building infrastructure that lasts. Join a team that is shaping Bihar's water future.

jobs.title: Site Engineer (Civil)
jobs.desc: Supervise on-site execution of water tower and reservoir projects, ensuring quality and timelines. (Sample opening — replace with your real role.)

jobs.title: Project Manager
jobs.desc: Own end-to-end delivery of water infrastructure projects from planning to commissioning. (Sample opening — replace with your real role.)

jobs.title: Junior Accountant
jobs.desc: Support project accounting, billing and vendor reconciliation for ongoing works. (Sample opening — replace with your real role.)
